content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: Done: added fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader.__init__, and updated get_source/list_templates to search self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath. Only touched FileSystemLoader class; other loader classes (PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, ModuleLoader) untouched by me, safe for your path_transform additions there. If you also modify FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates, please merge carefully around my searchpath+fallback_searchpath changes to avoid clobbering.
